title: Helix Jump
description: Jump and smash through the helix tower. A hyper-casual arcade game with addictive one-touch controls. Avoid the colored platforms and reach the bottom!

title: Paper.io 2
description: Expand your territory by drawing lines and capturing areas. Compete against other players in real-time. Simple controls, addictive gameplay loop.

title: Ball Rush
description: Roll the ball through challenging obstacles. Collect coins and unlock new balls. Endless runner mechanics with hyper-casual feel.

title: Knife Hit
description: Throw knives at rotating logs. Time your throws perfectly to avoid hitting other knives. Simple yet deeply satisfying one-tap mechanic.

title: Crowd City
description: Grow your crowd by absorbing people. Dominate the city map against other crowds. IO-style multiplayer with hyper-casual accessibility.

title: Sand Balls
description: Draw paths to guide colored balls into matching buckets. Satisfying physics-based puzzle gameplay. ASMR-friendly visual and audio design.

title: Aquapark.io
description: Race down a water slide and knock opponents off. Last one standing wins. Multiplayer IO game with vibrant summer aesthetics.

title: Woodturning 3D
description: Carve and shape wooden objects on a lathe. Satisfying turning mechanics with paint and decoration. Strong ASMR and crafting appeal.

title: Magic Tiles 3
description: Tap black tiles to the beat of popular songs. Rhythm-based hyper-casual with massive song library. Easy to learn, hard to master formula.

title: Stack Ball
description: Smash through rotating platforms. Break platforms to descend, avoid dark ones. One-tap mechanic with helix-style progression and satisfying destruction.
